content.scenarioHint: 你在街上偶遇一位很久没见的熟人，想自然地开启对话，表达关心并延续聊天。
expectedAnswers: Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?
Wow, it’s been ages! What have you been up to lately?
Hi there! I haven’t seen you in forever—how’s everything going?
Hey! Haven’t run into you in ages. How’s life treating you?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了久别重逢后的关心与问候
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态使用恰当（如现在完成时）
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯，不生硬或翻译腔
关键词覆盖：使用了场景关键词如 'long time no see', 'how’ve you been', 'lately' 等

content.scenarioHint: 熟人相遇，自然开启话题。服务方先打招呼并询问顾客需求
expectedAnswers: Oh wow, you're hiking this weekend? I've been wanting to try that trail.
I heard the trails near Blue Mountain are amazing this season. Have you been there?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词

content.speakerText: Hi Alex! Haven’t seen you in ages. What’s new with you?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，Alex！好久不见，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, I started learning guitar—I’ve been practicing three times a week!
I switched jobs last month and now I’m working remotely from home.
Not much, but I adopted a puppy last weekend—he’s a handful but so cute!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了'What's new'并分享真实生活变化
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态（现在完成时、过去时）和自然表达
表达自然度：语气轻松、有情感，避免简单回答'Nothing'或'Fine'
关键词覆盖：是否包含具体事件（learning guitar, switched jobs, adopted a puppy）
